{
  "preconditions": [
    "at least two coordinates must be provided",
    "all coordinates must be numbers"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the result is the Euclidean norm, sqrt(x^2 + y^2 + ...)",
    "the result is a non-negative number"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "zero coordinates results in a ValueError",
    "one coordinate results in a ValueError",
    "non-numeric coordinates result in a TypeError"
  ]
}
